hibernate-mapping.query: Select payCheck from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck as payCheck inner join payCheck.PayrollRun as payrollRun where payrollRun.Company =:company and payCheck.SourcePaycheckId =:sourcePaycheckId

Select pc.Id From com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck as pc inner join pc.PayrollRun as pr inner join pr.Company as c inner join c.CompanyServiceSet as cs Where cs.Company.SourceSystemCd = 'QBDT' and cs.Service.ServiceCd = 'Assisted' and cs.StatusCd != 'Terminated' and cs.StatusCd != 'Cancelled' and pr.PaycheckDate >= :startPaycheckDate and pr.PaycheckDate <= :endPaycheckDate order by c.SourceCompanyId

Select pc From com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck as pc inner join fetch pc.ThirdParty401kPaycheckSet as tpp Where pc.Company = :company and pc.SourceEmployee = :sourceEmployee and tpp.CurrentStateCd != 'Sent' and tpp.CurrentStateCd != 'Cancelled'

Select tppps From com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.ThirdParty401kPaycheckPendingState as tppps inner join fetch tppps.ThirdParty401kPaycheck as tpp inner join fetch tpp.Paycheck as pc inner join fetch pc.PayrollRun as pr inner join fetch pr.Company as c inner join c.CompanyServiceSet as cs inner join fetch pc.SourceEmployee Where tppps.StateCd = 'Pending' and tppps.InitiationDate >= cs.ServiceStartDate and tppps.InitiationDate <= :initiationDate and cs.StatusCd != 'Terminated' and cs.StatusCd != 'Cancelled' order by c.SourceCompanyId

Select pc From com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck as pc inner join pc.PayrollRun as pr inner join pr.Company as c inner join c.CompanyServiceSet as cs Where pc.PayrollRun.Company = :company and cs.Service.ServiceCd = 'ThirdParty401k' and cs.ServiceStartDate <= :today and cs.StatusCd != 'Terminated' and cs.StatusCd != 'Cancelled' and pr.PaycheckDate >= cs.ServiceStartDate and pc.Status = 'Active' and pc.SourceEmployee.SourceEmployeeId = :sourceEmployeeId and not exists ( Select bp.Paycheck From com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.ThirdParty401kBatchPaycheck as bp Where bp.Paycheck = pc ) order by c.SourceCompanyId

Select distinct payCheck from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn inner join finTxn.PaycheckSplit as payCheckSplit inner join payCheckSplit.Paycheck as payCheck inner join payCheck.PayrollRun as payrollRun where payrollRun.Company =:company and payCheck.SourcePaycheckId =:sourcePaycheckId and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd !=:txnState and finTxn.PaycheckSplit.Company = finTxn.Company and payCheckSplit.Paycheck.Company = payCheckSplit.Company

Select payCheck from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck as payCheck inner join payCheck.PayrollRun as payrollRun where payrollRun.Company =:company and payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate = :paycheckSettlementDate and payCheck.DDEmployee is not null

Select distinct tax, comp.SourceCompanyId, payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate ,payCheck.SourcePaycheckId from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Tax as tax, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck as payCheck, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp where comp.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and cs.Company=comp and payCheck.PayrollRun.Company = comp and payCheck.Status = :payCheckStatusCd and tax.Paycheck = payCheck and payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate >= :payChkFromDt and payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate < :payChkToDt order by comp.SourceCompanyId, cast(tax.Law.LawId as java.lang.Long), payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate,payCheck.SourcePaycheckId

Select distinct tax,tax.Paycheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate,payCheck.SourcePaycheckId from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Tax as tax, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck as payCheck, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp where comp.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and cs.Company=comp and comp.Id = :companyId and payCheck.PayrollRun.Company = comp and payCheck.Status = :payCheckStatusCd and tax.Paycheck = payCheck and payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate >= :payChkFromDt and payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate < :payChkToDt order by cast(tax.Law.LawId as java.lang.Long), tax.Paycheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate,payCheck.SourcePaycheckId

Select sum(tax.TaxLiabilityAmount) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Tax as tax, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck as payCheck, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp where comp.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and cs.Company=comp and comp.Id = :companyId and tax.Law.LawId = :lawId and payCheck.PayrollRun.Company = comp and payCheck.Status = :payCheckStatusCd and tax.Paycheck = payCheck and payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate >= :payChkFromDt and payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate < :payChkToDt

Select distinct tax, comp.SourceCompanyId, payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate ,emp.SourceEmployeeId from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Tax as tax, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck as payCheck, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee as emp where comp.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and cs.Company=comp and payCheck.PayrollRun.Company = comp and payCheck.Status = :payCheckStatusCd and tax.Paycheck = payCheck and payCheck.DDEmployee = emp and payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate >= :payChkFromDt and payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate < :payChkToDt order by comp.SourceCompanyId,emp.SourceEmployeeId, cast(tax.Law.LawId as java.lang.Long), payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate

Select distinct tax, payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate, emp.SourceEmployeeId from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Tax as tax, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck as payCheck, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee as emp where comp.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and cs.Company=comp and comp.Id = :companyId and payCheck.PayrollRun.Company = comp and payCheck.Status = :payCheckStatusCd and tax.Paycheck = payCheck and payCheck.DDEmployee = emp and payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate >= :payChkFromDt and payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate < :payChkToDt order by emp.SourceEmployeeId, cast(tax.Law.LawId as java.lang.Long), payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate

Select sum(tax.TaxLiabilityAmount),sum(tax.TaxableWagesAmount),sum(tax.TotalWagesAmount) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Tax as tax, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck as payCheck, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee as emp where comp.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and cs.Company=comp and comp.Id = :companyId and tax.Law.LawId = :lawId and emp.Id = :employeeId and payCheck.PayrollRun.Company = comp and payCheck.Status = :payCheckStatusCd and tax.Paycheck = payCheck and payCheck.DDEmployee = emp and payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate >= :payChkFromDt and payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate < :payChkToDt

Select sum(tax.TaxLiabilityAmount),sum(tax.TaxableWagesAmount),sum(tax.TotalWagesAmount) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Tax as tax, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck as payCheck where tax.Law = :law and tax.Company = :company and payCheck.PayrollRun.Company = :company and payCheck.Company = :company and payCheck.Status = :payCheckStatusCd and tax.Paycheck = payCheck and payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate >= :payChkFromDt and payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate <= :payChkToDt

Select sum(liabilityadj.Amount),sum(liabilityadj.TaxableWages),sum(liabilityadj.TotalWages) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.LiabilityAdjustment as liabilityadj where liabilityadj.Law = :law and liabilityadj.PayrollRun.Company = :company and liabilityadj.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate >= :payChkFromDt and liabilityadj.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate <= :payChkToDt

select count(distinct emp) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck as payCheck join payCheck.TaxSet as tax on tax.Company=:company join payCheck.SourceEmployee as emp where payCheck.PayrollRun.Company=:company and payCheck.Company=:company and payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate>=:paymentPeriodBegin and payCheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate<=:paymentPeriodEnd and tax.Law=:law

select payCheck.Id as payslipId, companyPayrollItem.Id as id, companyPayrollItem.PayrollItem.PayrollItemCode as typeName, compensation.HoursWorked as hoursInDouble, compensation.CompensationAmount as amount, payroll.PaycheckDate as paycheckDate, payCheck.PayPeriodBeginDate as payBeginDate, payCheck.PayPeriodEndDate as payEndDate, qbi.OvertimeMultiplier as otMultiplier, payCheck.NetAmount as netPay from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck as payCheck, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as payroll, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee as employee, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as company, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyPayrollItem as companyPayrollItem, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Compensation as compensation, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.QbdtPayrollItemInfo as qbi where payCheck.PayrollRun=payroll and (payCheck.SourceEmployee = employee or payCheck.DDEmployee = employee) and payCheck.Company=company and compensation.Paycheck=payCheck and compensation.CompanyPayrollItem=companyPayrollItem and qbi.CompanyPayrollItem=companyPayrollItem and companyPayrollItem.AdditionalPayrollItem is null and payroll.PaycheckDate >=:payPeriodBeginDate and payroll.PaycheckDate <=:payPeriodEndDate and company.IAMRealmId=:realmId and employee.Id=:employeeId order by paycheckDate,payCheck.CreatedDate

select companyPayrollItem.Id as id, companyPayrollItem.PayrollItem.PayrollItemCode as typeName, psItem.CurAmt as amount, psItem.QtyTime as hoursInString, paystub.Id as payslipId, paystub.PaycheckDate as paycheckDate, paystub.PayBeginDate as payBeginDate, paystub.PayEndDate as payEndDate, paystub.GrossPay as grossPay, paystub.NetPay as netPay, qbi.OvertimeMultiplier as otMultiplier from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paystub as paystub, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PstubEmployeeInfo as employeeInfo, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee as employee, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as company, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.QbdtPayrollItemInfo as qbi, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PstubPayItem as psItem, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyPayrollItem as companyPayrollItem where paystub.PstubEmployeeInfo= employeeInfo and paystub.Company= employeeInfo.Company and psItem.Paystub=paystub and psItem.Company=paystub.Company and employeeInfo.Employee=employee and employee.Company=company and employeeInfo.Company=employee.Company and qbi.ListId=psItem.PayrollItemListId and qbi.CompanyPayrollItem=companyPayrollItem and companyPayrollItem.AdditionalPayrollItem is null and qbi.Company=company and psItem.Type in ('Earnings') and paystub.PaycheckDate >=:payPeriodBeginDate and paystub.PaycheckDate <=:payPeriodEndDate and company.IAMRealmId=:realmId and employee.Id=:employeeId order by paycheckDate,paystub.CreatedDate
hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT /*+ INDEX (pc PSP_PAYCHECK_I2) */ * FROM PSP_PAYCHECK pc WHERE pc.COMPANY_FK = :company_seq AND pc.SOURCE_PAYCHECK_ID in (:paycheck_ids)
SELECT /*+ INDEX (pc PSP_PAYCHECK_I2) */ * FROM PSP_PAYCHECK pc WHERE pc.COMPANY_FK = :company_seq AND pc.SOURCE_PAYCHECK_ID = :paycheck_id
SELECT /*+ INDEX (pc PSP_PAYCHECK_I2) */ * FROM PSP_PAYCHECK pc WHERE pc.COMPANY_FK = :company_seq AND pc.SOURCE_PAYCHECK_ID = :paycheck_id AND pc.STATUS in (:status_ids)

select name, ssn, sum(totalwages) as sumTotalWages, sum(taxablewages) as sumTaxableWages, sum(tips) as sumTips, sum(tax) as sumTax from ( select pr.company_fk, pr.paycheck_date, law.payment_template_fk, law.law_id, ii.last_name || ', ' || ii.first_name || ' ' || ii.middle_name || '.' name, ee.tax_id_enc ssn , tax.total_wages_amount totalwages, taxable_wages_amount taxablewages , tax.tips_taxable_wage_amount tips , tax.tax_liability_amount tax from psp_payroll_run pr join psp_paycheck pc on pc.payroll_run_fk = pr.payroll_run_seq and pc.company_fk = :companyId join psp_employee ee on ee.employee_seq = pc.source_employee_fk join psp_individual ii on ii.individual_seq = ee.employee_seq join psp_tax tax on tax.paycheck_fk = pc.paycheck_seq and tax.company_fk = :companyId join psp_law law on tax.law_fk = law.law_id where pc.status = 'Active' and pc.SOURCE_PAYCHECK_ID not like '-%' and PAYROLL_RUN_STATUS !='Superseded' and pr.company_fk = :companyId union all ( select pr.company_fk, pr.paycheck_date, law.payment_template_fk, law.law_id, case when la.employee_fk is null then 'CLA' else ii.last_name || ', ' || ii.first_name || ' ' || ii.middle_name || '.' end, ee.tax_id_enc, la.total_wages, la.taxable_wages, 0, la.amount from psp_payroll_run pr join psp_liability_adjustment la on la.payroll_run_fk = pr.payroll_run_seq left join psp_employee ee on ee.employee_seq = la.employee_fk left join psp_individual ii on ii.individual_seq = ee.employee_seq join psp_law law on la.law_fk = law.law_id where PAYROLL_RUN_STATUS !='Superseded' and pr.company_fk = :companyId ) ) result where company_fk = :companyId and paycheck_date >= :paycheckStart and paycheck_date <= :paycheckEnd and payment_template_fk = :paymentTemplate and law_id = :lawId group by name, ssn

select employee_seq as employeeSeq, SUM(gross_pay) as ytdGrossAmt, SUM(commission) as ytdCommissionAmt, SUM(bonus_amt) as ytdBonusAmt, SUM(over_time) as ytdOvertimeAmt, SUM(other_amt) as ytdOtherAmt, SUM(salary_amt) as ytdSalaryAmt, SUM(hourly_amt) as ytdHourlyAmt, extract(year from PAYCHECK_DATE) as yr from ( select comp.COMPENSATION_AMOUNT as gross_pay, case when (cpi.payroll_item_fk in ('Salary') and qbi.OVERTIME_MULTIPLIER <= 1) then comp.COMPENSATION_AMOUNT end as salary_amt, case when (cpi.payroll_item_fk in ('Hourly') and qbi.OVERTIME_MULTIPLIER <= 1) then comp.COMPENSATION_AMOUNT end as hourly_amt, case when cpi.payroll_item_fk in ('Commission') then comp.COMPENSATION_AMOUNT end as commission, case when cpi.payroll_item_fk in ('Bonus') then comp.COMPENSATION_AMOUNT end as bonus_amt, case when (cpi.payroll_item_fk in ('Hourly') and qbi.OVERTIME_MULTIPLIER > 1) then comp.COMPENSATION_AMOUNT end as over_time, case when cpi.payroll_item_fk not in ('Commission','Bonus','Hourly','Salary') then comp.COMPENSATION_AMOUNT end as other_amt, emp.employee_seq, pr.paycheck_date from PSP_COMPENSATION comp, PSP_COMPANY co, PSP_EMPLOYEE emp, PSP_PAYCHECK pc, PSP_PAYROLL_RUN pr, PSP_COMPANY_PAYROLL_ITEM cpi, PSP_QBDT_PAYROLL_ITEM_INFO qbi where (emp.employee_seq = pc.d_d_employee_fk or emp.employee_seq = pc.source_employee_fk) and emp.company_fk = pc.company_fk and pc.paycheck_seq = comp.paycheck_fk and pc.company_fk = comp.company_fk and qbi.company_payroll_item_fk = comp.company_payroll_item_fk and qbi.company_payroll_item_fk = cpi.company_payroll_item_seq and cpi.ADDITIONAL_PAYROLL_ITEM_FK is null and emp.EMPLOYEE_SEQ = :employeeId and emp.COMPANY_FK = co.COMPANY_SEQ and co.I_A_M_REALM_ID = :realmId and pr.PAYROLL_RUN_SEQ = pc.PAYROLL_RUN_FK and pr.company_fk = pc.company_fk and pr.PAYCHECK_DATE >= :payPeriodBeginDate and pr.PAYCHECK_DATE <= :payPeriodEndDate ) result group by employee_seq, extract(year from paycheck_date) order by yr

select employee_seq as employeeSeq, SUM(gross_pay) as ytdGrossAmt, SUM(commission) as ytdCommissionAmt, SUM(bonus_amt) as ytdBonusAmt, SUM(over_time) as ytdOvertimeAmt, SUM(other_amt) as ytdOtherAmt, SUM(salary_amt) as ytdSalaryAmt, SUM(hourly_amt) as ytdHourlyAmt, extract(year from PAYCHECK_DATE) as yr from ( select psi.CUR_AMT as gross_pay, case when (cpi.payroll_item_fk in ('Salary') and qbi.OVERTIME_MULTIPLIER <= 1) then psi.CUR_AMT end as salary_amt, case when (cpi.payroll_item_fk in ('Hourly') and qbi.OVERTIME_MULTIPLIER <= 1) then psi.CUR_AMT end as hourly_amt, case when cpi.payroll_item_fk in ('Commission') then psi.CUR_AMT end as commission, case when cpi.payroll_item_fk in ('Bonus') then psi.CUR_AMT end as bonus_amt, case when (cpi.payroll_item_fk in ('Hourly') and qbi.OVERTIME_MULTIPLIER > 1) then psi.CUR_AMT end as over_time, case when cpi.payroll_item_fk not in ('Commission','Bonus','Hourly','Salary') then psi.CUR_AMT end as other_amt, emp.employee_seq, ps.paycheck_date from PSP_PAYSTUB ps, PSP_PSTUB_EMPLOYEE_INFO psin, PSP_EMPLOYEE emp, PSP_COMPANY co, PSP_PSTUB_PAY_ITEM psi, PSP_QBDT_PAYROLL_ITEM_INFO qbi, PSP_COMPANY_PAYROLL_ITEM cpi where PS.PSTUB_EMPLOYEE_INFO_FK = psin.PSTUB_EMPLOYEE_INFO_SEQ and ps.company_fk = psin.company_fk and ps.paystub_seq = psi.paystub_fk and ps.company_fk = psi.company_fk and qbi.LIST_ID = psi.PAYROLL_ITEM_LIST_ID and qbi.COMPANY_FK = co.COMPANY_SEQ and emp.EMPLOYEE_SEQ = PSIN.EMPLOYEE_FK and emp.company_fk = psin.company_fk and psi.type in ('Earnings') and cpi.COMPANY_PAYROLL_ITEM_SEQ = qbi.COMPANY_PAYROLL_ITEM_FK and cpi.ADDITIONAL_PAYROLL_ITEM_FK is null and psin.EMPLOYEE_FK = :employeeId and emp.COMPANY_FK = co.COMPANY_SEQ and co.I_A_M_REALM_ID = :realmId and ps.paycheck_date >= :payPeriodBeginDate and ps.paycheck_date <= :payPeriodEndDate ) result group by employee_seq, EXTRACT(year from paycheck_date) order by yr
